steps.title: Recognize the multiplier
steps.content: Each year's increase is based on the previous year's value. That creates a repeated multiplier, not a repeated addition.

steps.title: Find the growth factor
steps.content: An increase of $0.69\%$ means multiplying each year by $$ 1+0.0069=1.0069 $$ Because the multiplier is greater than $1$, the model is increasing exponential. The answer is C.
